name: Red Fort
description: A historic fort in the city of Delhi that served as the main residence of the Mughal Emperors.
location: Netaji Subhash Marg, Chandni Chowk, New Delhi, Delhi 110006

name: India Gate
description: An arch-memorial dedicated to the soldiers of the British Indian Army who died in World War I.
location: Rajpath, India Gate, New Delhi, Delhi 110001

name: Qutub Minar
description: A minaret that forms part of the Qutb complex, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
location: Qutb Minar, Mehrauli, New Delhi, Delhi 110030

name: Lotus Temple
description: A Bahá'í House of Worship notable for its flowerlike shape.
location: Lotus Temple Rd, Bahapur, Shambhu Dayal Bagh, Kalkaji, New Delhi, Delhi 110019

name: Humayun's Tomb
description: The tomb of the Mughal Emperor Humayun, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
location: Mathura Rd, Nizamuddin East, New Delhi, Delhi 110013
